# Testing of Utility Function equations

Here we try to evaluate the range of the utility function values,
given different inputs


## 1/(1 + alpha * load + (1-alpha) * delay)

### Haskell expression

The following output values for:  alpha, load, delay, utility function

> putStr ( unlines $ map show  [(alpha, load, delay, 1/(1 + alpha * load + (1-alpha) * delay)) | alpha <-[0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.9], load <- [1..10], delay <- [1..10]])

